summary: Iter 57 — VELA Location Intelligence backend + frontend e2e validated. Backend: 6/6 pytest passed (provider status, Glyfada full + cache, lat/lng-only, missing body 400, invalid address graceful, sources regression). Frontend: /location landing, Glyfada demo result (8.6 PRIME, OPENSTREETMAP·CACHED), Plaka custom analyze (7.5 STRONG, tourism=10, beach=0 correctly inland), sub-scores card, drivers/weaknesses, toggle details with 8 categorized travel rows, back nav, empty-input toast, and 'Location' nav link all confirmed. Regression: /operate and /invest/asset/demo cinematic flows still load correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: location_intelligence.py is 593 lines — close to the 700-line soft limit; consider splitting providers (google, overpass) into submodules if more features land.
Cache TTL hardcoded to 30 days — consider env var if business rules need shorter staleness windows.
Overpass query has no per-mirror timeout differentiation; if all 3 mirrors are slow the request can still take up to 90s. Currently mitigated by aggressive 30-day cache.

/api/location/analyze with invalid address returns 502 (from analyze_location ValueError catch path on geocode-miss). Spec asked for 400 'or graceful'; current behavior is graceful but a 400 would be more semantically correct. Non-blocking.
seed_data_creation: Glyfada cache entry created in location_cache collection during first backend test (subsequent calls return cached=true).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_iter57_location.py covers provider/analyze/cache/error paths. Glyfada is now permanently warm in the location_cache (cached=true on every call). For new untested addresses the cold path can take 5-30s (Overpass). Frontend Location page testids: location-landing, location-input, location-analyze-btn, location-demo-{glyfada|koukaki|plaka}, location-result, location-score-value (contains ONLY the number e.g. '8.6'; '/ 10' is a sibling), location-verdict-pill, location-resolved-address, location-driver-{i}, location-weakness-{i}, location-toggle-details, location-travel-summary, location-travel-row-{category}, location-result-back-btn. Color palette confirmed: bg #F7F4EF, no terracotta/bronze observed.
